task_completion.description: Verify that the total expenses paid by each roommate are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cells in the spreadsheet displaying the total amounts paid by each person: Alice ($1707.25), Bob ($218.30), and Carol ($157.20).

task_completion.description: Verify that the net balances for each roommate are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cells showing the calculated net balances: Alice (+$1030.00), Bob (-$478.95), and Carol (-$551.05).

task_completion.description: Verify that the final settlement amounts (who pays whom) are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cells or a section indicating the specific settlement transfers (e.g., Bob pays Alice $478.95, Carol pays Alice $551.05).

task_completion.description: Verify that spreadsheet formulas were used for the calculations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the formula bar at the top of the spreadsheet application. When a calculated cell is selected, it should display a formula (e.g., '=SUM(...)', '=B2-C2') rather than a hardcoded number.

task_completion.description: Verify that conditional formatting is applied to the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for color-coded cells in the results/balances area (e.g., positive balances highlighted in green, negative balances in red, or similar automatic visual styling based on the values).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine spreadsheet application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) with visible ribbons, toolbars, and a grid UI, rather than a terminal window or plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the spreadsheet rather than running a script to generate a finished file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for signs of manual GUI interaction, such as selected cells, active formula bars, or intermediate steps, rather than just a single screenshot of a perfectly completed CSV file opened at the end.

integrity.description: Verify the original expense data is still present and was used for the calculations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet should still contain the original 10 expense rows from January 2024 alongside the newly created calculation tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves 10 expenses from Jan 2024. Expected Totals Paid: Alice = $1707.25, Bob = $218.30, Carol = $157.20. Expected Balances: Alice is owed $1030.00 (positive balance), Bob owes $478.95 (negative balance), Carol owes $551.05 (negative balance). The sum of all balances must be exactly $0.00. Settlement amounts should reflect Bob paying Alice $478.95 and Carol paying Alice $551.05.
